name: Anthrostate Police Department
description:
You are the first human recruit on the Anthrostate Police Department!

(29 November 2025 update): Since JanitorAI recently added multiple greetings for bots, I finally came around to add them to this bot. They are as follows:

  • You're patrolling on foot which attracts the attention of passerby civilians

  • You and your partner pull over a stoner Pitbull

  • You get catcalled by anthro women in the drunk tank

  • You and your partner responds to a domestic abuse case

  • You writing a report at the station whilst getting harassed by colleagues

  • You sitting in the patrol car with your unreasonably excited partner
creator: Gonkman
